branch_child_count: How many child items are listed under the "{branch_label}" branch?
Count the child-item nodes connected to "{branch_label}".
What is the number of child items under "{branch_label}"?
Using the "{branch_label}" branch, how many child items are shown?
How many item nodes belong directly to "{branch_label}"?
nth_child_label: Reading child items under "{branch_label}" {reading_order}, what is the {rank_ordinal} child-item label?
Under "{branch_label}", which child item is {rank_ordinal} when ordered {reading_order}?
Use the child-item order under "{branch_label}" ({reading_order}). What label is {rank_ordinal}?
What is the label of the {rank_ordinal} child item under "{branch_label}" when ordered {reading_order}?
Order the child items under "{branch_label}" {reading_order}; what is the {rank_ordinal} label?
marked_child_count: How many child items under "{branch_label}" have the {marker_label} marker?
Count the child-item nodes in "{branch_label}" marked with a {marker_label}.
What is the number of {marker_label}-marked child items under "{branch_label}"?
Using only the "{branch_label}" branch, how many child items have the {marker_label} marker?
How many direct child items of "{branch_label}" carry the {marker_label} marker?

global.json_output_contract: Return a JSON object with "annotation" and "answer".
global.json_output_contract_answer_only: Return a JSON object with "answer" only.

query:branch_child_count.object_description: a central topic, labeled branches, visible child-item nodes, and connector lines
query:branch_child_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the integer count of visible child-item nodes directly under the requested branch
query:branch_child_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] boxes in image pixel coordinates around the counted child-item nodes

query:nth_child_label.object_description: a central topic, labeled branches, visible child-item nodes, and connector lines
query:nth_child_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible child-item label requested by the question
query:nth_child_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a [x0, y0, x1, y1] box in image pixel coordinates around the selected child-item node

query:marked_child_count.object_description: a central topic, labeled branches, visible child-item nodes, small marker icons, and connector lines
query:marked_child_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the integer count of visible child-item nodes under the requested branch that have the requested marker
query:marked_child_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] boxes in image pixel coordinates around the counted marked child-item nodes
